в”Ӯ                    Project Maintainer                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         (Strategic decisions, release approval)             в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                          в”Ӯ
        в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
        в–ј                 в–ј                 в–ј
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Doc Lead     в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  Tooling Lead в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  Plugin Leads в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (Standards)  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  (Automation) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  (Per-plugin) в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

#### Role Definitions

| Role | Responsibilities | Current State |
|------|------------------|---------------|
| **Project Maintainer** | Release approval, architectural decisions | Implicit (terryli) |
| **Doc Lead** | Documentation standards, CLAUDE.md compliance, review workflows | Unassigned |
| **Tooling Lead** | Automation scripts, validation tools, CI/CD | Implicit |
| **Plugin Leads** | Per-plugin ownership (23 plugins) | Unassigned |

### 2.2 Plugin Ownership Matrix

| Plugin | Owner | Status |
|--------|-------|--------|
| plugin-dev | @plugin-dev owner | Proposed |
| itp | @itp owner | Proposed |
| itp-hooks | @itp-hooks owner | Proposed |
| gh-tools | @gh-tools owner | Proposed |
| devops-tools | @devops-tools owner | Proposed |
| dotfiles-tools | @dotfiles-tools owner | Proposed |
| doc-tools | @doc-tools owner | Proposed |
| quality-tools | @quality-tools owner | Proposed |
| productivity-tools | @productivity-tools owner | Proposed |
| mql5 | @mql5 owner | Proposed |
| ru | @ru owner | Proposed |
| statusline-tools | @statusline-tools owner | Proposed |
| asciinema-tools | @asciinema-tools owner | Proposed |
| git-town-workflow | @git-town-workflow owner | Proposed |
| quant-research | @quant-research owner | Proposed |
| gmail-commander | @gmail-commander owner | Proposed |
| kokoro-tts | @kokoro-tts owner | Proposed |
| tts-telegram-sync | @tts-telegram-sync owner | Proposed |
| calcom-commander | @calcom-commander owner | Proposed |
| mise | @mise owner | Proposed |
| gitnexus-tools | @gitnexus-tools owner | Proposed |
| rust-tools | @rust-tools owner | Proposed |

---

## 3. Review & Update Workflows

### 3.1 Documentation Review Workflow

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ   Author     в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ   PR Review  в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ  Doc Lead    в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ   Merge      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (Plugin     в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ  (Standards  в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ  Approval    в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Owner)     в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ   Check)      в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
        в”Ӯ                    в”Ӯ                    в”Ӯ
        в–ј                    в–ј                    в–ј
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ validate-    в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ CLAUDE.md    в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ Release      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ plugins.mjs  в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ lint check   в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ Pipeline     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### 3.2 Pre-Release Documentation Checklist

Before any release, ensure:

- [ ] `validate-plugins.mjs --strict` passes
- [ ] All 23 plugins have valid marketplace.json entries
- [ ] All plugin CLAUDE.md files follow header format: `# <plugin-name> Plugin`
- [ ] All plugins have Hub + Sibling navigation links
- [ ] Root CLAUDE.md states "23 plugins"
- [ ] plugins/CLAUDE.md lists all 23 plugins
- [ ] No orphaned files in docs/ directory
- [ ] lychee link check passes

### 3.3 Plugin CLAUDE.md Standards

| Element | Required | Format |
|--------|----------|--------|
| Header | Yes | `# <plugin-name> Plugin` |
| Description | Yes | `> Brief description` |
| Hub Link | Yes | `**Hub**: [Root CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)` |
| Sibling Links | Yes | `**Sibling**: [<name> CLAUDE.md](../<path>/CLAUDE.md)` |
| Skills Table | Yes (or "No skills") | `\| Skill \| Purpose \|` |
| Commands Table | Recommended | `\| Command \| Purpose \|` |
| Hooks Table | If applicable | `\| Hook \| Event \| Purpose \|` |

---

## 4. Maintenance Workflows

### 4.1 Automation Ownership

| Tool/Script | Owner | Maintenance Frequency |
|-------------|-------|----------------------|
| `validate-plugins.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-commands-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-hooks-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-versions.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| lychee link checker | Tooling Lead | Weekly or per-PR |
| semantic-release | Tooling Lead | Per-release |

### 4.2 New Plugin Onboarding

When adding a new plugin:

1. **Marketplace Entry**: Add to `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
2. **Create CLAUDE.md**: Use template (see Section 3.3)
3. **Create SKILL.md**: Follow skill template with frontmatter
4. **Add Hooks**: Create `hooks.json` if applicable
5. **Run Validation**: `validate-plugins.mjs --fix`
6. **Assign Owner**: Update this governance document

### 4.3 Orphan Cleanup Process

Quarterly review to identify and address orphaned content:

| Orphan File | Action |
|-------------|--------|
| `docs/tool-inventory.md` | Integrate into docs/CLAUDE.md or delete |
| `docs/adr/2025-12-13-itp-hooks-file-tree-detection.md` | Link from itp-hooks or archive |
| `docs/design/2025-12-10-clickhouse-skill-documentation-gaps/spec.md` | Link from devops-tools or delete |

---

## 5. Automation Improvements (from Task-3)

### 5.1 Immediate Actions

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Add lychee to CI pipeline | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Run sync-enabled-plugins.sh post-release | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Fix root CLAUDE.md "20 plugins" вҶ’ "23" | Doc Lead | Proposed |
| Fix plugins/CLAUDE.md "21 plugins" вҶ’ "23" | Doc Lead | Proposed |

### 5.2 Short-Term Improvements

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Add markdownlint to validate-plugins.mjs | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Extend validate-plugins.mjs for CLAUDE.md structure | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Add missing Sibling link to kokoro-tts | kokoro-tts owner | Proposed |
| Add Skills tables to 7 missing plugins | Respective owners | Proposed |

### 5.3 Long-Term Improvements

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Create SKILL.md schema and validator | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Build documentation dashboard | Doc Lead | Proposed |
| Create shared 1Password reference doc | Doc Lead | Proposed |

---

## 6. Enforcement Mechanisms

### 6.1 Pre-Commit Validation

Add to CI pipeline:

```yaml
# .github/workflows/docs.yml
- name: Validate plugins
  run: bun scripts/validate-plugins.mjs --strict

- name: Check links
  run: lychee --config lychee.toml docs/
```

### 6.2 Release Gate

Only allow releases when:

- All validation checks pass
- No orphaned files detected
- Plugin count matches (23)
- All owners assigned

---

## 7. Open Questions

1. **Owner Assignment**: How should plugin owners be assigned? By expertise, interest, or rotation?
2. **Doc Lead Role**: Should this be a dedicated role or shared responsibility?
3. **Orphan Policy**: Should orphaned files be auto-deleted or archived first?
4. **Validation Frequency**: Run full validation per-PR or only per-release?

---

## 8. Recommendations Summary

### High Priority

1. **Assign Doc Lead** to oversee documentation standards
2. **Assign Plugin Owners** for all 23 plugins
3. **Fix plugin count** in root

# Governance & Maintenance Model

**Task:** Task 9: Governance & Maintenance Model  
**Generated:** 2026-03-02  
**Synthesizes:** Task-1 (Standards), Task-3 (Toolchain), Task-6 (Deduplication)

---

## Executive Summary

This document proposes a governance structure for the cc-skills documentation ecosystem based on findings from three investigative tasks:

- **Task-1**: Found 23 plugins with inconsistent documentation standards (87% compliance)
- **Task-3**: Mapped automation tools with maturity gaps in validation/linting
- **Task-6**: Identified 3 orphaned files and duplicated content patterns

The proposed governance model establishes clear ownership, review workflows, and automation responsibilities to maintain documentation quality at scale.

---

## 1. Current State Analysis

### 1.1 Documentation Health Metrics

| Metric | Current | Target |
|--------|---------|--------|
| Plugin count (marketplace.json) | 23 | 23 |
| Root CLAUDE.md plugin count | 20 (incorrect) | 23 |
| Plugins/CLAUDE.md plugin count | 21 (incorrect) | 23 |
| CLAUDE.md compliance rate | 87% | 100% |
| Orphaned files | 3 | 0 |
| Automation maturity (validation) | Medium | High |

### 1.2 Identified Issues (from dependencies)

| Issue | Source | Severity |
|-------|--------|----------|
| Plugin count mismatch in root CLAUDE.md | Task-1 | High |
| Missing Sibling link in kokoro-tts | Task-6 | High |
| 3 orphaned files (tool-inventory.md, 2 ADRs) | Task-6 | Medium |
| No markdown/CLAUDE.md linting | Task-3 | Medium |
| No SKILL.md template validation | Task-3 | Medium |
| 7 plugins missing Skills tables | Task-1 | Medium |
| 16 plugins missing Commands tables | Task-1 | Low |
| Duplicate 1Password documentation | Task-6 | Low |

---

## 2. Proposed Governance Structure

### 2.1 Ownership Model

```

### 3.2 Pre-Release Documentation Checklist

Before any release, ensure:

- [ ] `validate-plugins.mjs --strict` passes
- [ ] All 23 plugins have valid marketplace.json entries
- [ ] All plugin CLAUDE.md files follow header format: `# <plugin-name> Plugin`
- [ ] All plugins have Hub + Sibling navigation links
- [ ] Root CLAUDE.md states "23 plugins"
- [ ] plugins/CLAUDE.md lists all 23 plugins
- [ ] No orphaned files in docs/ directory
- [ ] lychee link check passes

### 3.3 Plugin CLAUDE.md Standards

| Element | Required | Format |
|--------|----------|--------|
| Header | Yes | `# <plugin-name> Plugin` |
| Description | Yes | `> Brief description` |
| Hub Link | Yes | `**Hub**: [Root CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)` |
| Sibling Links | Yes | `**Sibling**: [<name> CLAUDE.md](../<path>/CLAUDE.md)` |
| Skills Table | Yes (or "No skills") | `\| Skill \| Purpose \|` |
| Commands Table | Recommended | `\| Command \| Purpose \|` |
| Hooks Table | If applicable | `\| Hook \| Event \| Purpose \|` |

---

## 4. Maintenance Workflows

### 4.1 Automation Ownership

| Tool/Script | Owner | Maintenance Frequency |
|-------------|-------|----------------------|
| `validate-plugins.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-commands-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-hooks-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-versions.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| lychee link checker | Tooling Lead | Weekly or per-PR |
| semantic-release | Tooling Lead | Per-release |

### 4.2 New Plugin Onboarding

When adding a new plugin:

1. **Marketplace Entry**: Add to `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
2. **Create CLAUDE.md**: Use template (see Section 3.3)
3. **Create SKILL.md**: Follow skill template with frontmatter
4. **Add Hooks**: Create `hooks.json` if applicable
5. **Run Validation**: `validate-plugins.mjs --fix`
6. **Assign Owner**: Update this governance document

### 4.3 Orphan Cleanup Process

Quarterly review to identify and address orphaned content:

| Orphan File | Action |
|-------------|--------|
| `docs/tool-inventory.md` | Integrate into docs/CLAUDE.md or delete |
| `docs/adr/2025-12-13-itp-hooks-file-tree-detection.md` | Link from itp-hooks or archive |
| `docs/design/2025-12-10-clickhouse-skill-documentation-gaps/spec.md` | Link from devops-tools or delete |

---

## 5. Automation Improvements (from Task-3)

### 5.1 Immediate Actions

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Add lychee to CI pipeline | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Run sync-enabled-plugins.sh post-release | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Fix root CLAUDE.md "20 plugins" вҶ’ "23" | Doc Lead | Proposed |
| Fix plugins/CLAUDE.md "21 plugins" вҶ’ "23" | Doc Lead | Proposed |

### 5.2 Short-Term Improvements

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Add markdownlint to validate-plugins.mjs | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Extend validate-plugins.mjs for CLAUDE.md structure | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Add missing Sibling link to kokoro-tts | kokoro-tts owner | Proposed |
| Add Skills tables to 7 missing plugins | Respective owners | Proposed |

### 5.3 Long-Term Improvements

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Create SKILL.md schema and validator | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Build documentation dashboard | Doc Lead | Proposed |
| Create shared 1Password reference doc | Doc Lead | Proposed |

---

## 6. Enforcement Mechanisms

### 6.1 Pre-Commit Validation

Add to CI pipeline:

```yaml
# .github/workflows/docs.yml
- name: Validate plugins
  run: bun scripts/validate-plugins.mjs --strict

- name: Check links
  run: lychee --config lychee.toml docs/
```

### 6.2 Release Gate

Only allow releases when:

- All validation checks pass
- No orphaned files detected
- Plugin count matches (23)
- All owners assigned

---

## 7. Open Questions

1. **Owner Assignment**: How should plugin owners be assigned? By expertise, interest, or rotation?
2. **Doc Lead Role**: Should this be a dedicated role or shared responsibility?
3. **Orphan Policy**: Should orphaned files be auto-deleted or archived first?
4. **Validation Frequency**: Run full validation per-PR or only per-release?

---

## 8. Recommendations Summary

### High Priority

1. **Assign Doc Lead** to oversee documentation standards
2. **Assign Plugin Owners** for all 23 plugins
3. **Fix plugin count** in root and plugins/CLAUDE.md
4. **Add Sibling link** to kokoro-tts/CLAUDE.md
5. **Address 3 orphaned files**

**Task:** Task 9: Governance & Maintenance Model  
**Generated:** 2026-03-02  
**Synthesizes:** Task-1 (Standards), Task-3 (Toolchain), Task-6 (Deduplication)

---

## Executive Summary

This document proposes a governance structure for the cc-skills documentation ecosystem based on findings from three investigative tasks:

- **Task-1**: Found 23 plugins with inconsistent documentation standards (87% compliance)
- **Task-3**: Mapped automation tools with maturity gaps in validation/linting
- **Task-6**: Identified 3 orphaned files and duplicated content patterns

The proposed governance model establishes clear ownership, review workflows, and automation responsibilities to maintain documentation quality at scale.

в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### 3.2 Pre-Release Documentation Checklist

Before any release, ensure:

- [ ] `validate-plugins.mjs --strict` passes
- [ ] All 23 plugins have valid marketplace.json entries
- [ ] All plugin CLAUDE.md files follow header format: `# <plugin-name> Plugin`
- [ ] All plugins have Hub + Sibling navigation links
- [ ] Root CLAUDE.md states "23 plugins"
- [ ] plugins/CLAUDE.md lists all 23 plugins
- [ ] No orphaned files in docs/ directory
- [ ] lychee link check passes

### 3.3 Plugin CLAUDE.md Standards

| Element | Required | Format |
|--------|----------|--------|
| Header | Yes | `# <plugin-name> Plugin` |
| Description | Yes | `> Brief description` |
| Hub Link | Yes | `**Hub**: [Root CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)` |
| Sibling Links | Yes | `**Sibling**: [<name> CLAUDE.md](../<path>/CLAUDE.md)` |
| Skills Table | Yes (or "No skills") | `\| Skill \| Purpose \|` |
| Commands Table | Recommended | `\| Command \| Purpose \|` |
| Hooks Table | If applicable | `\| Hook \| Event \| Purpose \|` |

---

## 4. Maintenance Workflows

### 4.1 Automation Ownership

| Tool/Script | Owner | Maintenance Frequency |
|-------------|-------|----------------------|
| `validate-plugins.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-commands-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-hooks-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-versions.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| lychee link checker | Tooling Lead | Weekly or per-PR |
| semantic-release | Tooling Lead | Per-release |

### 4.2 New Plugin Onboarding

When adding a new plugin:

1. **Marketplace Entry**: Add to `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
2. **Create CLAUDE.md**: Use template (see Section 3.3)
3. **Create SKILL.md**: Follow skill template with frontmatter
4. **Add Hooks**: Create `hooks.json` if applicable
5. **Run Validation**: `validate-plugins.mjs --fix`
6. **Assign Owner**: Update this governance document

### 4.3 Orphan Cleanup Process

Quarterly review to identify and address orphaned content:

| Orphan File | Action |
|-------------|--------|
| `docs/tool-inventory.md` | Integrate into docs/CLAUDE.md or delete |
| `docs/adr/2025-12-13-itp-hooks-file-tree-detection.md` | Link from itp-hooks or archive |
| `docs/design/2025-12-10-clickhouse-skill-documentation-gaps/spec.md` | Link from devops-tools or delete |

---

## 5. Automation Improvements (from Task-3)

### 5.1 Immediate Actions

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Add lychee to CI pipeline | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Run sync-enabled-plugins.sh post-release | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Fix root CLAUDE.md "20 plugins" вҶ’ "23" | Doc Lead | Proposed |
| Fix plugins/CLAUDE.md "21 plugins" вҶ’ "23" | Doc Lead | Proposed |

### 5.2 Short-Term Improvements

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Add markdownlint to validate-plugins.mjs | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Extend validate-plugins.mjs for CLAUDE.md structure | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Add missing Sibling link to kokoro-tts | kokoro-tts owner | Proposed |
| Add Skills tables to 7 missing plugins | Respective owners | Proposed |

### 5.3 Long-Term Improvements

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Create SKILL.md schema and validator | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Build documentation dashboard | Doc Lead | Proposed |
| Create shared 1Password reference doc | Doc Lead | Proposed |

---

## 6. Enforcement Mechanisms

### 6.1 Pre-Commit Validation

Add to CI pipeline:

```yaml
# .github/workflows/docs.yml
- name: Validate plugins
  run: bun scripts/validate-plugins.mjs --strict

- name: Check links
  run: lychee --config lychee.toml docs/
```

### 6.2 Release Gate

Only allow releases when:

- All validation checks pass
- No orphaned files detected
- Plugin count matches (23)
- All owners assigned

---

## 7. Open Questions

1. **Owner Assignment**: How should plugin owners be assigned? By expertise, interest, or rotation?
2. **Doc Lead Role**: Should this be a dedicated role or shared responsibility?
3. **Orphan Policy**: Should orphaned files be auto-deleted or archived first?
4. **Validation Frequency**: Run full validation per-PR or only per-release?

---

## 8. Recommendations Summary

### High Priority

1. **Assign Doc Lead** to oversee documentation standards
2. **Assign Plugin Owners** for all 23 plugins
3. **Fix plugin count** in root and plugins/CLAUDE.md
4. **Add Sibling link** to kokoro-tts/CLAUDE.md
5. **Address 3 orphaned files**

### 3.2 Pre-Release Documentation Checklist

Before any release, ensure:

- [ ] `validate-plugins.mjs --strict` passes
- [ ] All 23 plugins have valid marketplace.json entries
- [ ] All plugin CLAUDE.md files follow header format: `# <plugin-name> Plugin`
- [ ] All plugins have Hub + Sibling navigation links
- [ ] Root CLAUDE.md states "23 plugins"
- [ ] plugins/CLAUDE.md lists all 23 plugins
- [ ] No orphaned files in docs/ directory
- [ ] lychee link check passes

### 3.3 Plugin CLAUDE.md Standards

| Element | Required | Format |
|--------|----------|--------|
| Header | Yes | `# <plugin-name> Plugin` |
| Description | Yes | `> Brief description` |
| Hub Link | Yes | `**Hub**: [Root CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)` |
| Sibling Links | Yes | `**Sibling**: [<name> CLAUDE.md](../<path>/CLAUDE.md)` |
| Skills Table | Yes (or "No skills") | `\| Skill \| Purpose \|` |
| Commands Table | Recommended | `\| Command \| Purpose \|` |
| Hooks Table | If applicable | `\| Hook \| Event \| Purpose \|` |

---

## 4. Maintenance Workflows

### 4.1 Automation Ownership

| Tool/Script | Owner | Maintenance Frequency |
|-------------|-------|----------------------|
| `validate-plugins.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-commands-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-hooks-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-versions.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| lychee link checker | Tooling Lead | Weekly or per-PR |
| semantic-release | Tooling Lead | Per-release |

### 4.2 New Plugin Onboarding

When adding a new plugin:

1. **Marketplace Entry**: Add to `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
2. **Create CLAUDE.md**: Use template (see Section 3.3)
3. **Create SKILL.md**: Follow skill template with frontmatter
4. **Add Hooks**: Create `hooks.json` if applicable
5. **Run Validation**: `validate-plugins.mjs --fix`
6. **Assign Owner**: Update this governance document

### 4.3 Orphan Cleanup Process

Quarterly review to identify and address orphaned content:

| Orphan File | Action |
|-------------|--------|
| `docs/tool-inventory.md` | Integrate into docs/CLAUDE.md or delete |
| `docs/adr/2025-12-13-itp-hooks-file-tree-detection.md` | Link from itp-hooks or archive |
| `docs/design/2025-12-10-clickhouse-skill-documentation-gaps/spec.md` | Link from devops-tools or delete |

---

## 5. Automation Improvements (from Task-3)

### 5.1 Immediate Actions

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Add lychee to CI pipeline | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Run sync-enabled-plugins.sh post-release | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Fix root CLAUDE.md "20 plugins" вҶ’ "23" | Doc Lead | Proposed |
| Fix plugins/CLAUDE.md "21 plugins" вҶ’ "23" | Doc Lead | Proposed |

### 5.2 Short-Term Improvements

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Add markdownlint to validate-plugins.mjs | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Extend validate-plugins.mjs for CLAUDE.md structure | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Add missing Sibling link to kokoro-tts | kokoro-tts owner | Proposed |
| Add Skills tables to 7 missing plugins | Respective owners | Proposed |

### 5.3 Long-Term Improvements

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Create SKILL.md schema and validator | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Build documentation dashboard | Doc Lead | Proposed |
| Create shared 1Password reference doc | Doc Lead | Proposed |

---

## 6. Enforcement Mechanisms

### 6.1 Pre-Commit Validation

Add to CI pipeline:

```yaml
# .github/workflows/docs.yml
- name: Validate plugins
  run: bun scripts/validate-plugins.mjs --strict

- name: Check links
  run: lychee --config lychee.toml docs/
```

### 6.2 Release Gate

Only allow releases when:

- All validation checks pass
- No orphaned files detected
- Plugin count matches (23)
- All owners assigned

---

## 7. Open Questions

1. **Owner Assignment**: How should plugin owners be assigned? By expertise, interest, or rotation?
2. **Doc Lead Role**: Should this be a dedicated role or shared responsibility?
3. **Orphan Policy**: Should orphaned files be auto-deleted or archived first?
4. **Validation Frequency**: Run full validation per-PR or only per-release?

---

## 8. Recommendations Summary

### High Priority

1. **Assign Doc Lead** to oversee documentation standards
2. **Assign Plugin Owners** for all 23 plugins
3. **Fix plugin count** in root and plugins/CLAUDE.md
4. **Add Sibling link** to kokoro-tts/CLAUDE.md
5. **Address 3 orphaned files**

### Medium Priority

6. **Add lychee to CI** for link checking
7. **Create SKILL.md validator** 
8. **Add missing Skills tables**

## Executive Summary

This document proposes a governance structure for the cc-skills documentation ecosystem based on findings from three investigative tasks:

- **Task-1**: Found 23 plugins with inconsistent documentation standards (87% compliance)
- **Task-3**: Mapped automation tools with maturity gaps in validation/linting
- **Task-6**: Identified 3 orphaned files and duplicated content patterns

The proposed governance model establishes clear ownership, review workflows, and automation responsibilities to maintain documentation quality at scale.

| `sync-commands-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-hooks-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-versions.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| lychee link checker | Tooling Lead | Weekly or per-PR |
| semantic-release | Tooling Lead | Per-release |

### 4.2 New Plugin Onboarding

When adding a new plugin:

1. **Marketplace Entry**: Add to `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
2. **Create CLAUDE.md**: Use template (see Section 3.3)
3. **Create SKILL.md**: Follow skill template with frontmatter
4. **Add Hooks**: Create `hooks.json` if applicable
5. **Run Validation**: `validate-plugins.mjs --fix`
6. **Assign Owner**: Update this governance document

### 4.3 Orphan Cleanup Process

Quarterly review to identify and address orphaned content:

| Orphan File | Action |
|-------------|--------|
| `docs/tool-inventory.md` | Integrate into docs/CLAUDE.md or delete |
| `docs/adr/2025-12-13-itp-hooks-file-tree-detection.md` | Link from itp-hooks or archive |
| `docs/design/2025-12-10-clickhouse-skill-documentation-gaps/spec.md` | Link from devops-tools or delete |

## 5. Automation Improvements (from Task-3)

### 5.1 Immediate Actions

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Add lychee to CI pipeline | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Run sync-enabled-plugins.sh post-release | Tooling Lead | Proposed |

| Fix plugins/CLAUDE.md "21 plugins" вҶ’ "23" | Doc Lead | Proposed |

| Add missing Sibling link to kokoro-tts | kokoro-tts owner | Proposed |
| Add Skills tables to 7 missing plugins | Respective owners | Proposed |

### 5.3 Long-Term Improvements

|-------------|-------|--------|
| Create SKILL.md schema and validator | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Build documentation dashboard | Doc Lead | Proposed |
| Create shared 1Password reference doc | Doc Lead | Proposed |

---

## 6. Enforcement Mechanisms

### 6.1 Pre-Commit Validation

Add to CI pipeline:

```yaml
# .github/workflows/docs.yml
- name: Validate plugins
  run: bun scripts/validate-plugins.mjs --strict

- name: Check links
  run: lychee --config lychee.toml docs/
```

### 6.2 Release Gate

Only allow releases when:

- All validation checks pass
- No orphaned files detected
- Plugin count matches (23)
- All owners assigned

---

## 7. Open Questions

1. **Owner Assignment**: How should plugin owners be assigned? By expertise, interest, or rotation?
2. **Doc Lead Role**: Should this be a dedicated role or shared responsibility?
3. **Orphan Policy**: Should orphaned files be auto-deleted or archived first?

8. **Add missing Skills tables**

# Governance & Maintenance Model

**Task:** Task 9: Governance & Maintenance Model  
**Generated:** 2026-03-02  
**Synthesizes:** Task-1 (Standards), Task-3 (Toolchain), Task-6 (Deduplication)

---

## Executive Summary

This document proposes a governance structure for the cc-skills documentation ecosystem based on findings from three investigative tasks:

- **Task-1**: Found 23 plugins with inconsistent documentation standards (87% compliance)
- **Task-3**: Mapped automation tools with maturity gaps in validation/linting
- **Task-6**: Identified 3 orphaned files and duplicated content patterns

The proposed governance model establishes clear ownership, review workflows, and automation responsibilities to maintain documentation quality at scale.

---

## 1. Current State Analysis

### 1.1 Documentation Health Metrics

| Metric | Current | Target |
|--------|---------|--------|
| Plugin count (marketplace.json) | 23 | 23 |
| Root CLAUDE.md plugin count | 20 (incorrect) | 23 |
| Plugins/CLAUDE.md plugin count | 21 (incorrect) | 23 |
| CLAUDE.md compliance rate | 87% | 100% |
| Orphaned files | 3 | 0 |
| Automation maturity (validation) | Medium | High |

### 1.2 Identified Issues (from dependencies)

| Issue | Source | Severity |
|-------|--------|----------|
| Plugin count mismatch in root CLAUDE.md | Task-1 | High |
| Missing Sibling link in kokoro-tts | Task-6 | High |
| 3 orphaned files (tool-inventory.md, 2 ADRs) | Task-6 | Medium |
| No markdown/CLAUDE.md linting | Task-3 | Medium |
| No SKILL.md template validation | Task-3 | Medium |
| 7 plugins missing Skills tables | Task-1 | Medium |
| 16 plugins missing Commands tables | Task-1 | Low |
| Duplicate 1Password documentation | Task-6 | Low |

---

## 2. Proposed Governance Structure

### 2.1 Ownership Model

```

в”Ӯ                    Project Maintainer                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         (Strategic decisions, release approval)             в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                          в”Ӯ

в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Doc Lead     в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  Tooling Lead в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  Plugin Leads в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (Standards)  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  (Automation) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  (Per-plugin) в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

| **Plugin Leads** | Per-plugin ownership (23 plugins) | Unassigned |

## 3. Review & Update Workflows

### 3.1 Documentation Review Workflow

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ   Author     в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ   PR Review  в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ  Doc Lead    в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ   Merge      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (Plugin     в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ  (Standards  в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ  Approval    в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Owner)     в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ   Check)      в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

### 3.2 Pre-Release Documentation Checklist

Before any release, ensure:

- [ ] `validate-plugins.mjs --strict` passes

- [ ] All plugin CLAUDE.md files follow header format: `# <plugin-name> Plugin`

### 3.3 Plugin CLAUDE.md Standards

| Hub Link | Yes | `**Hub**: [Root CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)` |
| Sibling Links | Yes | `**Sibling**: [<name> CLAUDE.md](../<path>/CLAUDE.md)` |
| Skills Table | Yes (or "No skills") | `\| Skill \| Purpose \|` |
| Commands Table | Recommended | `\| Command \| Purpose \|` |
| Hooks Table | If applicable | `\| Hook \| Event \| Purpose \|` |

# Governance & Maintenance Model

**Task:** Task 9: Governance & Maintenance Model  
**Generated:** 2026-03-02  
**Synthesizes:** Task-1 (Standards), Task-3 (Toolchain), Task-6 (Deduplication)

---

## Executive Summary

This document proposes a governance structure for the cc-skills documentation ecosystem based on findings from three investigative tasks:

- **Task-1**: Found 23 plugins with inconsistent documentation standards (87% compliance)
- **Task-3**: Mapped automation tools with maturity gaps in validation/linting
- **Task-6**: Identified 3 orphaned files and duplicated content patterns

The proposed governance model establishes clear ownership, review workflows, and automation responsibilities to maintain documentation quality at scale.

---

## 1. Current State Analysis

### 1.1 Documentation Health Metrics

| Metric | Current | Target |
|--------|---------|--------|
| Plugin count (marketplace.json) | 23 | 23 |
| Root CLAUDE.md plugin count | 20 (incorrect) | 23 |
| Plugins/CLAUDE.md plugin count | 21 (incorrect) | 23 |
| CLAUDE.md compliance rate | 87% | 100% |
| Orphaned files | 3 | 0 |
| Automation maturity (validation) | Medium | High |

### 1.2 Identified Issues (from dependencies)

| Issue | Source | Severity |
|-------|--------|----------|
| Plugin count mismatch in root CLAUDE.md | Task-1 | High |
| Missing Sibling link in kokoro-tts | Task-6 | High |
| 3 orphaned files (tool-inventory.md, 2 ADRs) | Task-6 | Medium |
| No markdown/CLAUDE.md linting | Task-3 | Medium |
| No SKILL.md template validation | Task-3 | Medium |
| 7 plugins missing Skills tables | Task-1 | Medium |
| 16 plugins missing Commands tables | Task-1 | Low |
| Duplicate 1Password documentation | Task-6 | Low |

---

2. **Doc Lead Role**: Should this be a dedicated role or shared responsibility?
3. **Orphan Policy**: Should orphaned files be auto-deleted or archived first?
4. **Validation Frequency**: Run full validation per-PR or only per-release?

---

## 8. Recommendations Summary

### High Priority

1. **Assign Doc Lead** to oversee documentation standards
2. **Assign Plugin Owners** for all 23 plugins
3. **Fix plugin count** in root and plugins/CLAUDE.md
4. **Add Sibling link** to kokoro-tts/CLAUDE.md
5. **Address 3 orphaned files**

### Medium Priority

6. **Add lychee to CI** for link checking
7. **Create SKILL.md validator** 
8. **Add missing Skills tables** to 7 plugins

### Low Priority

9. **Create shared 1Password reference**
10. **Build documentation dashboard**

---

## Appendix: Related Task

### 3.2 Pre-Release Documentation Checklist

Before any release, ensure:

- [ ] `validate-plugins.mjs --strict` passes
- [ ] All 23 plugins have valid marketplace.json entries
- [ ] All plugin CLAUDE.md files follow header format: `# <plugin-name> Plugin`
- [ ] All plugins have Hub + Sibling navigation links
- [ ] Root CLAUDE.md states "23 plugins"
- [ ] plugins/CLAUDE.md lists all 23 plugins
- [ ] No orphaned files in docs/ directory
- [ ] lychee link check passes

### 3.3 Plugin CLAUDE.md Standards

| Element | Required | Format |
|--------|----------|--------|
| Header | Yes | `# <plugin-name> Plugin` |
| Description | Yes | `> Brief description` |
| Hub Link | Yes | `**Hub**: [Root CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)` |
| Sibling Links | Yes | `**Sibling**: [<name> CLAUDE.md](../<path>/CLAUDE.md)` |
| Skills Table | Yes (or "No skills") | `\| Skill \| Purpose \|` |
| Commands Table | Recommended | `\| Command \| Purpose \|` |
| Hooks Table | If applicable | `\| Hook \| Event \| Purpose \|` |

---

## 4. Maintenance Workflows

### 4.1 Automation Ownership

| Tool/Script | Owner | Maintenance Frequency |
|-------------|-------|----------------------|
| `validate-plugins.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-commands-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-hooks-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-versions.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| lychee link checker | Tooling Lead | Weekly or per-PR |
| semantic-release | Tooling Lead | Per-release |

### 4.2 New Plugin Onboarding

When adding a new plugin:

1. **Marketplace Entry**: Add to `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
2. **Create CLAUDE.md**: Use template (see Section 3.3)
3. **Create SKILL.md**: Follow skill template with frontmatter
4. **Add Hooks**: Create `hooks.json` if applicable
5. **Run Validation**: `validate-plugins.mjs --fix`
6. **Assign Owner**: Update this governance document

### 4.3 Orphan Cleanup Process

Quarterly review to identify and address orphaned content:

| Orphan File | Action |
|-------------|--------|
| `docs/tool-inventory.md` | Integrate into docs/CLAUDE.md or delete |
| `docs/adr/2025-12-13-itp-hooks-file-tree-detection.md` | Link from itp-hooks or archive |
| `docs/design/2025-12-10-clickhouse-skill-documentation-gaps/spec.md` | Link from devops-tools or delete |

---

## 5. Automation Improvements (from Task-3)

### 5.1 Immediate Actions

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Add lychee to CI pipeline | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Run sync-enabled-plugins.sh post-release | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Fix root CLAUDE.md "20 plugins" вҶ’ "23" | Doc Lead | Proposed |
| Fix plugins/CLAUDE.md "21 plugins" вҶ’ "23" | Doc Lead | Proposed |

### 5.2 Short-Term Improvements

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Add markdownlint to validate-plugins.mjs | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Extend validate-plugins.mjs for CLAUDE.md structure | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Add missing Sibling link to kokoro-tts | kokoro-tts owner | Proposed |
| Add Skills tables to 7 missing plugins | Respective owners | Proposed |

### 5.3 Long-Term Improvements

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Create SKILL.md schema and validator | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Build documentation dashboard | Doc Lead | Proposed |
| Create shared 1Password reference doc | Doc Lead | Proposed |

---

## 6. Enforcement Mechanisms

### 6.1 Pre-Commit Validation

Add to CI pipeline:

```yaml
# .github/workflows/docs.yml
- name: Validate plugins
  run: bun scripts/validate-plugins.mjs --strict

- name: Check links
  run: lychee --config lychee.toml docs/
```

### 6.2 Release Gate

Only allow releases when:

- All validation checks pass
- No orphaned files detected
- Plugin count matches (23)
- All owners assigned

---

## 7. Open Questions

1. **Owner Assignment**: How should plugin owners be assigned? By expertise, interest, or rotation?
2. **Doc Lead Role**: Should this be a dedicated role or shared responsibility?
3. **Orphan Policy**: Should orphaned files be auto-deleted or archived first?
4. **Validation Frequency**: Run full validation per-PR or only per-release?

---

## 8. Recommendations Summary

1. **Assign Doc Lead** to oversee documentation standards
2. **Assign Plugin Owners** for all 23 plugins
3. **Fix plugin count** in root and plugins/CLAUDE.md
4. **Add Sibling link** to kokoro-tts/CLAUDE.md
5. **Address 3 orphaned files**

6. **Add lychee to CI** for link checking
7. **Create SKILL.md validator** 
8. **Add missing Skills tables** to 7 plugins

### Low Priority

9. **Create shared 1Password reference**
10. **Build documentation dashboard**

### 3.2 Pre-Release Documentation Checklist

Before any release, ensure:

- [ ] `validate-plugins.mjs --strict` passes
- [ ] All 23 plugins have valid marketplace.json entries
- [ ] All plugin CLAUDE.md files follow header format: `# <plugin-name> Plugin`
- [ ] All plugins have Hub + Sibling navigation links
- [ ] Root CLAUDE.md states "23 plugins"
- [ ] plugins/CLAUDE.md lists all 23 plugins
- [ ] No orphaned files in docs/ directory
- [ ] lychee link check passes

### 3.3 Plugin CLAUDE.md Standards

| Element | Required | Format |
|--------|----------|--------|
| Header | Yes | `# <plugin-name> Plugin` |
| Description | Yes | `> Brief description` |
| Hub Link | Yes | `**Hub**: [Root CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)` |
| Sibling Links | Yes | `**Sibling**: [<name> CLAUDE.md](../<path>/CLAUDE.md)` |
| Skills Table | Yes (or "No skills") | `\| Skill \| Purpose \|` |
| Commands Table | Recommended | `\| Command \| Purpose \|` |
| Hooks Table | If applicable | `\| Hook \| Event \| Purpose \|` |

---

## 4. Maintenance Workflows

### 4.1 Automation Ownership

| Tool/Script | Owner | Maintenance Frequency |
|-------------|-------|----------------------|
| `validate-plugins.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-commands-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-hooks-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-versions.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| lychee link checker | Tooling Lead | Weekly or per-PR |
| semantic-release | Tooling Lead | Per-release |

### 4.2 New Plugin Onboarding

When adding a new plugin:

1. **Marketplace Entry**: Add to `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
2. **Create CLAUDE.md**: Use template (see Section 3.3)
3. **Create SKILL.md**: Follow skill template with frontmatter
4. **Add Hooks**: Create `hooks.json` if applicable
5. **Run Validation**: `validate-plugins.mjs --fix`
6. **Assign Owner**: Update this governance document

### 4.3 Orphan Cleanup Process

Quarterly review to identify and address orphaned content:

| Orphan File | Action |
|-------------|--------|
| `docs/tool-inventory.md` | Integrate into docs/CLAUDE.md or delete |
| `docs/adr/2025-12-13-itp-hooks-file-tree-detection.md` | Link from itp-hooks or archive |
| `docs/design/2025-12-10-clickhouse-skill-documentation-gaps/spec.md` | Link from devops-tools or delete |

---

## 5. Automation Improvements (from Task-3)

### 5.1 Immediate Actions

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Add lychee to CI pipeline | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Run sync-enabled-plugins.sh post-release | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Fix root CLAUDE.md "20 plugins" вҶ’ "23" | Doc Lead | Proposed |
| Fix plugins/CLAUDE.md "21 plugins" вҶ’ "23" | Doc Lead | Proposed |

### 5.2 Short-Term Improvements

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Add markdownlint to validate-plugins.mjs | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Extend validate-plugins.mjs for CLAUDE.md structure | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Add missing Sibling link to kokoro-tts | kokoro-tts owner | Proposed |
| Add Skills tables to 7 missing plugins | Respective owners | Proposed |

### 5.3 Long-Term Improvements

| Improvement | Owner | Status |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| Create SKILL.md schema and validator | Tooling Lead | Proposed |
| Build documentation dashboard | Doc Lead | Proposed |
| Create shared 1Password reference doc | Doc Lead | Proposed |

---

## 6. Enforcement Mechanisms

### 6.1 Pre-Commit Validation

Add to CI pipeline:

```yaml
# .github/workflows/docs.yml
- name: Validate plugins
  run: bun scripts/validate-plugins.mjs --strict

- name: Check links
  run: lychee --config lychee.toml docs/
```

### 6.2 Release Gate

Only allow releases when:

- All validation checks pass
- No orphaned files detected
- Plugin count matches (23)
- All owners assigned

---

## 7. Open Questions

1. **Owner Assignment**: How should plugin owners be assigned? By expertise, interest, or rotation?
2. **Doc Lead Role**: Should this be a dedicated role or shared responsibility?
3. **Orphan Policy**: Should orphaned files be auto-deleted or archived first?
4. **Validation Frequency**: Run full validation per-PR or only per-release?

---

## 8. Recommendations Summary

### High Priority

1. **Assign Doc Lead** to oversee documentation standards
2. **Assign Plugin Owners** for all 23 plugins
3. **Fix plugin count** in root and plugins/CLAUDE.md
4. **Add Sibling link** to kokoro-tts/CLAUDE.md
5. **Address 3 orphaned files**

### Medium Priority

6. **Add lychee to CI** for link checking
7. **Create SKILL.md validator** 
8. **Add missing Skills tables** to 7 plugins

### Low Priority

9. **Create shared 1Password reference**
10. **Build documentation dashboard**

---

## Appendix: Related Task

## Executive Summary

This document proposes a governance structure for the cc-skills documentation ecosystem based on findings from three investigative tasks:

- **Task-1**: Found 23 plugins with inconsistent documentation standards (87% compliance)
- **Task-3**: Mapped automation tools with maturity gaps in validation/linting
- **Task-6**: Identified 3 orphaned files and duplicated content patterns

The proposed governance model establishes clear ownership, review workflows, and automation responsibilities to maintain documentation quality at scale.

---

## 1. Current State Analysis

### 1.1 Documentation Health Metrics

| Metric | Current | Target |
|--------|---------|--------|
| Plugin count (marketplace.json) | 23 | 23 |
| Root CLAUDE.md plugin count | 20 (incorrect) | 23 |
| Plugins/CLAUDE.md plugin count | 21 (incorrect) | 23 |
| CLAUDE.md compliance rate | 87% | 100% |
| Orphaned files | 3 | 0 |
| Automation maturity (validation) | Medium | High |

### 1.2 Identified Issues (from dependencies)

| Issue | Source | Severity |
|-------|--------|----------|
| Plugin count mismatch in root CLAUDE.md | Task-1 | High |
| Missing Sibling link in kokoro-tts | Task-6 | High |
| 3 orphaned files (tool-inventory.md, 2 ADRs) | Task-6 | Medium |
| No markdown/CLAUDE.md linting | Task-3 | Medium |
| No SKILL.md template validation | Task-3 | Medium |
| 7 plugins missing Skills tables | Task-1 | Medium |
| 16 plugins missing Commands tables | Task-1 | Low |
| Duplicate 1Password documentation | Task-6 | Low |

---

## 2. Proposed Governance Structure

### 2.1 Ownership Model

```

| **Doc Lead** | Documentation standards, CLAUDE.md compliance, review workflows | Unassigned |
| **Tooling Lead** | Automation scripts, validation tools, CI/CD | Implicit |
| **Plugin Leads** | Per-plugin ownership (23 plugins) | Unassigned |

## 3. Review & Update Workflows

### 3.1 Documentation Review Workflow

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ

---

## Executive Summary

This document proposes a governance structure for the cc-skills documentation ecosystem based on findings from three investigative tasks:

- **Task-1**: Found 23 plugins with inconsistent documentation standards (87% compliance)

### 3.2 Pre-Release Documentation Checklist

Before any release, ensure:

- [ ] `validate-plugins.mjs --strict` passes
- [ ] All 23 plugins have valid marketplace.json entries
- [ ] All plugin CLAUDE.md files follow header format: `# <plugin-name> Plugin`
- [ ] All plugins have Hub + Sibling navigation links
- [ ] Root CLAUDE.md states "23 plugins"
- [ ] plugins/CLAUDE.md lists all 23 plugins
- [ ] No orphaned files in docs/ directory
- [ ] lychee link check passes

### 3.3 Plugin CLAUDE.md Standards

| Element | Required | Format |
|--------|----------|--------|
| Header | Yes | `# <plugin-name> Plugin` |
| Description | Yes | `> Brief description` |
| Hub Link | Yes | `**Hub**: [Root CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)` |
| Sibling Links | Yes | `**Sibling**: [<name> CLAUDE.md](../<path>/CLAUDE.md)` |
| Skills Table | Yes (or "No skills") | `\| Skill \| Purpose \|` |
| Commands Table | Recommended | `\| Command \| Purpose \|` |
| Hooks Table | If applicable | `\| Hook \| Event \| Purpose \|` |

---

## 4. Maintenance Workflows

### 4.1 Automation Ownership

| Tool/Script | Owner | Maintenance Frequency |
|-------------|-------|----------------------|
| `validate-plugins.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-commands-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-hooks-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-versions.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| lychee link checker | Tooling Lead | Weekly or per-PR |
| semantic-release | Tooling Lead | Per-release |

### 4.2 New Plugin Onboarding

When adding a new plugin:

1. **Marketplace Entry**: Add to `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
2. **Create CLAUDE.md**: Use template (see Section 3.3)
3. **Create SKILL.md**: Follow skill template with frontmatter
4. **Add Hooks**: Create `hooks.json` if applicable
5. **Run Validation**: `validate-plugins.mjs --fix`
6. **Assign Owner**: Update this governance document

### 4.3 Orphan Cleanup Process

Quarterly review to identify and address orphaned content:

| Orphan File | Action |
|-------------|--------|
| `docs/tool-inventory.md` | Integrate into docs/CLAUDE.md or delete |
| `docs/adr/2025-12-13-itp-hooks-file-tree-detection.md` | Link from itp-hooks or archive |
| `docs/design/2025-12-10-clickhouse-skill-documentation-gaps/spec.md` | Link from devops-tools or delete |

## 6. Enforcement Mechanisms

### 6.1 Pre-Commit Validation

Add to CI pipeline:

```yaml
# .github/workflows/docs.yml
- name: Validate plugins
  run: bun scripts/validate-plugins.mjs --strict

- name: Check links
  run: lychee --config lychee.toml docs/
```

### 6.2 Release Gate

Only allow releases when:

- All validation checks pass
- No orphaned files detected
- Plugin count matches (23)
- All owners assigned

---

## 7. Open Questions

1. **Owner Assignment**: How should plugin owners be assigned? By expertise, interest, or rotation?
2. **Doc Lead Role**: Should this be a dedicated role or shared responsibility?
3. **Orphan Policy**: Should orphaned files be auto-deleted or archived first?
4. **Validation Frequency**: Run full validation per-PR or only per-release?

### 3.2 Pre-Release Documentation Checklist

Before any release, ensure:

- [ ] `validate-plugins.mjs --strict` passes
- [ ] All 23 plugins have valid marketplace.json entries
- [ ] All plugin CLAUDE.md files follow header format: `# <plugin-name> Plugin`
- [ ] All plugins have Hub + Sibling navigation links
- [ ] Root CLAUDE.md states "23 plugins"
- [ ] plugins/CLAUDE.md lists all 23 plugins
- [ ] No orphaned files in docs/ directory
- [ ] lychee link check passes

### 3.3 Plugin CLAUDE.md Standards

| Element | Required | Format |
|--------|----------|--------|
| Header | Yes | `# <plugin-name> Plugin` |
| Description | Yes | `> Brief description` |
| Hub Link | Yes | `**Hub**: [Root CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)` |
| Sibling Links | Yes | `**Sibling**: [<name> CLAUDE.md](../<path>/CLAUDE.md)` |
| Skills Table | Yes (or "No skills") | `\| Skill \| Purpose \|` |
| Commands Table | Recommended | `\| Command \| Purpose \|` |
| Hooks Table | If applicable | `\| Hook \| Event \| Purpose \|` |

| Tool/Script | Owner | Maintenance Frequency |
|-------------|-------|----------------------|
| `validate-plugins.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-commands-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-hooks-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-versions.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| lychee link checker | Tooling Lead | Weekly or per-PR |
| semantic-release | Tooling Lead | Per-release |

3. **Create SKILL.md**: Follow skill template with frontmatter
4. **Add Hooks**: Create `hooks.json` if applicable
5. **Run Validation**: `validate-plugins.mjs --fix`

|-------------|--------|

```

### 6.2 Release Gate

Only allow releases when:

- All validation checks pass

## 7. Open Questions

1. **Owner Assignment**: How should plugin owners be assigned? By expertise, interest, or rotation?
2. **Doc Lead Role**: Should this be a dedicated role or shared responsibility?
3. **Orphan Policy**: Should orphaned files be auto-deleted or archived first?
4. **Validation Frequency**: Run full validation per-PR or only per-release?

2. **Assign Plugin Owners** for all 23 plugins
3. **Fix plugin count** in root and plugins/CLAUDE.md
4. **Add Sibling link** to kokoro-tts/CLAUDE.md

6. **Add lychee to CI** for link checking

9. **Create shared 1Password reference**
10. **Build documentation dashboard**

# Governance & Maintenance Model

**Task:** Task 9: Governance & Maintenance Model  
**Generated:** 2026-03-02  
**Synthesizes:** Task-1 (Standards), Task-3 (Toolchain), Task-6 (Deduplication)

---

## Executive Summary

This document proposes a governance structure for the cc-skills documentation ecosystem based on findings from three investigative tasks:

- **Task-1**: Found 23 plugins with inconsistent documentation standards (87% compliance)
- **Task-3**: Mapped automation tools with maturity gaps in validation/linting
- **Task-6**: Identified 3 orphaned files and duplicated content patterns

The proposed governance model establishes clear ownership, review workflows, and automation responsibilities to maintain documentation quality at scale.

---

## 1. Current State Analysis

### 1.1 Documentation Health Metrics

| Metric | Current | Target |
|--------|---------|--------|
| Plugin count (marketplace.json) | 23 | 23 |

| Plugins/CLAUDE.md plugin count | 21 (incorrect) | 23 |
| CLAUDE.md compliance rate | 87% | 100% |
| Orphaned files | 3 | 0 |
| Automation maturity (validation) | Medium | High |

### 1.2 Identified Issues (from dependencies)

| Issue | Source | Severity |
|-------|--------|----------|
| Plugin count mismatch in root CLAUDE.md | Task-1 | High |
| Missing Sibling link in kokoro-tts | Task-6 | High |
| 3 orphaned files (tool-inventory.md, 2 ADRs) | Task-6 | Medium |
| No markdown/CLAUDE.md linting | Task-3 | Medium |
| No SKILL.md template validation | Task-3 | Medium |
| 7 plugins missing Skills tables | Task-1 | Medium |
| 16 plugins missing Commands tables | Task-1 | Low |
| Duplicate 1Password documentation | Task-6 | Low |

---

## 2. Proposed Governance Structure

### 2.1 Ownership Model

```

Before any release, ensure:

- [ ] `validate-plugins.mjs --strict` passes
- [ ] All 23 plugins have valid marketplace.json entries
- [ ] All plugin CLAUDE.md files follow header format: `# <plugin-name> Plugin`
- [ ] All plugins have Hub + Sibling navigation links
- [ ] Root CLAUDE.md states "23 plugins"
- [ ] plugins/CLAUDE.md lists all 23 plugins
- [ ] No orphaned files in docs/ directory
- [ ] lychee link check passes

### 3.3 Plugin CLAUDE.md Standards

| Element | Required | Format |
|--------|----------|--------|
| Header | Yes | `# <plugin-name> Plugin` |
| Description | Yes | `> Brief description` |
| Hub Link | Yes | `**Hub**: [Root CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)` |
| Sibling Links | Yes | `**Sibling**: [<name> CLAUDE.md](../<path>/CLAUDE.md)` |
| Skills Table | Yes (or "No skills") | `\| Skill \| Purpose \|` |
| Commands Table | Recommended | `\| Command \| Purpose \|` |
| Hooks Table | If applicable | `\| Hook \| Event \| Purpose \|` |

## 4. Maintenance Workflows

### 4.1 Automation Ownership

| Tool/Script | Owner | Maintenance Frequency |
|-------------|-------|----------------------|
| `validate-plugins.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-commands-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-hooks-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-versions.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| lychee link checker | Tooling Lead | Weekly or per-PR |
| semantic-release | Tooling Lead | Per-release |

### 4.2 New Plugin Onboarding

When adding a new plugin:

1. **Marketplace Entry**: Add to `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
2. **Create CLAUDE.md**: Use template (see Section 3.3)
3. **Create SKILL.md**: Follow skill template with frontmatter
4. **Add Hooks**: Create `hooks.json` if applicable
5. **Run Validation**: `validate-plugins.mjs --fix`
6. **Assign Owner**: Update this governance document

### 4.3 Orphan Cleanup Process

Quarterly review to identify and address orphaned content:

| Orphan File | Action |
|-------------|--------|
| `docs/tool-inventory.md` | Integrate into docs/CLAUDE.md or delete |
| `docs/adr/2025-12-13-itp-hooks-file-tree-detection.md` | Link from itp-hooks or archive |
| `docs/design/2025-12-10-clickhouse-skill-documentation-gaps/spec.md` | Link from devops-tools or delete |

## 6. Enforcement Mechanisms

### 6.1 Pre-Commit Validation

Add to CI pipeline:

```yaml
# .github/workflows/docs.yml
- name: Validate plugins
  run: bun scripts/validate-plugins.mjs --strict

- name: Check links
  run: lychee --config lychee.toml docs/
```

### 6.2 Release Gate

Only allow releases when:

- All validation checks pass
- No orphaned files detected
- Plugin count matches (23)
- All owners assigned

---

## 7. Open Questions

1. **Owner Assignment**: How should plugin owners be assigned? By expertise, interest, or rotation?
2. **Doc Lead Role**: Should this be a dedicated role or shared responsibility?
3. **Orphan Policy**: Should orphaned files be auto-deleted or archived first?
4. **Validation Frequency**: Run full validation per-PR or only per-release?

# Governance & Maintenance Model

**Task:** Task 9: Governance & Maintenance Model  
**Generated:** 2026-03-02  
**Synthesizes:** Task-1 (Standards), Task-3 (Toolchain), Task-6 (Deduplication)

---

## Executive Summary

This document proposes a governance structure for the cc-skills documentation ecosystem based on findings from three investigative tasks:

- **Task-1**: Found 23 plugins with inconsistent documentation standards (87% compliance)
- **Task-3**: Mapped automation tools with maturity gaps in validation/linting
- **Task-6**: Identified 3 orphaned files and duplicated content patterns

The proposed governance model establishes clear ownership, review workflows, and automation responsibilities to maintain documentation quality at scale.

---

## 1. Current State Analysis

### 1.1 Documentation Health Metrics

| Plugin count (marketplace.json) | 23 | 23 |
| Root CLAUDE.md plugin count | 20 (incorrect) | 23 |
| Plugins/CLAUDE.md plugin count | 21 (incorrect) | 23 |
| CLAUDE.md compliance rate | 87% | 100% |
| Orphaned files | 3 | 0 |
| Automation maturity (validation) | Medium | High |

### 1.2 Identified Issues (from dependencies)

| Issue | Source | Severity |
|-------|--------|----------|
| Plugin count mismatch in root CLAUDE.md | Task-1 | High |
| Missing Sibling link in kokoro-tts | Task-6 | High |
| 3 orphaned files (tool-inventory.md, 2 ADRs) | Task-6 | Medium |
| No markdown/CLAUDE.md linting | Task-3 | Medium |
| No SKILL.md template validation | Task-3 | Medium |
| 7 plugins missing Skills tables | Task-1 | Medium |
| 16 plugins missing Commands tables | Task-1 | Low |
| Duplicate 1Password documentation | Task-6 | Low |

### 3.3 Plugin CLAUDE.md Standards

| Skills Table | Yes (or "No skills") | `\| Skill \| Purpose \|` |

| Hooks Table | If applicable | `\| Hook \| Event \| Purpose \|` |

4. **Add Hooks**: Create `hooks.json` if applicable
5. **Run Validation**: `validate-plugins.mjs --fix`
6. **Assign Owner**: Update this governance document

### 3.2 Pre-Release Documentation Checklist

Before any release, ensure:

- [ ] `validate-plugins.mjs --strict` passes
- [ ] All 23 plugins have valid marketplace.json entries
- [ ] All plugin CLAUDE.md files follow header format: `# <plugin-name> Plugin`
- [ ] All plugins have Hub + Sibling navigation links
- [ ] Root CLAUDE.md states "23 plugins"
- [ ] plugins/CLAUDE.md lists all 23 plugins
- [ ] No orphaned files in docs/ directory
- [ ] lychee link check passes

### 3.3 Plugin CLAUDE.md Standards

| Element | Required | Format |
|--------|----------|--------|
| Header | Yes | `# <plugin-name> Plugin` |
| Description | Yes | `> Brief description` |
| Hub Link | Yes | `**Hub**: [Root CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)` |
| Sibling Links | Yes | `**Sibling**: [<name> CLAUDE.md](../<path>/CLAUDE.md)` |
| Skills Table | Yes (or "No skills") | `\| Skill \| Purpose \|` |
| Commands Table | Recommended | `\| Command \| Purpose \|` |
| Hooks Table | If applicable | `\| Hook \| Event \| Purpose \|` |

## 4. Maintenance Workflows

### 4.1 Automation Ownership

| Tool/Script | Owner | Maintenance Frequency |
|-------------|-------|----------------------|
| `validate-plugins.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-commands-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-hooks-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-versions.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| lychee link checker | Tooling Lead | Weekly or per-PR |
| semantic-release | Tooling Lead | Per-release |

### 4.2 New Plugin Onboarding

When adding a new plugin:

1. **Marketplace Entry**: Add to `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
2. **Create CLAUDE.md**: Use template (see Section 3.3)
3. **Create SKILL.md**: Follow skill template with frontmatter
4. **Add Hooks**: Create `hooks.json` if applicable
5. **Run Validation**: `validate-plugins.mjs --fix`
6. **Assign Owner**: Update this governance document

### 4.3 Orphan Cleanup Process

Quarterly review to identify and address orphaned content:

| Orphan File | Action |
|-------------|--------|
| `docs/tool-inventory.md` | Integrate into docs/CLAUDE.md or delete |
| `docs/adr/2025-12-13-itp-hooks-file-tree-detection.md` | Link from itp-hooks or archive |
| `docs/design/2025-12-10-clickhouse-skill-documentation-gaps/spec.md` | Link from devops-tools or delete |

## 6. Enforcement Mechanisms

### 6.1 Pre-Commit Validation

Add to CI pipeline:

```yaml
# .github/workflows/docs.yml
- name: Validate plugins
  run: bun scripts/validate-plugins.mjs --strict

- name: Check links
  run: lychee --config lychee.toml docs/
```

### 6.2 Release Gate

Only allow releases when:

- All validation checks pass
- No orphaned files detected
- Plugin count matches (23)
- All owners assigned

---

## 7. Open Questions

1. **Owner Assignment**: How should plugin owners be assigned? By expertise, interest, or rotation?
2. **Doc Lead Role**: Should this be a dedicated role or shared responsibility?
3. **Orphan Policy**: Should orphaned files be auto-deleted or archived first?
4. **Validation Frequency**: Run full validation per-PR or only per-release?

## Executive Summary

This document proposes a governance structure for the cc-skills documentation ecosystem based on findings from three investigative tasks:

- **Task-1**: Found 23 plugins with inconsistent documentation standards (87% compliance)
- **Task-3**: Mapped automation tools with maturity gaps in validation/linting
- **Task-6**: Identified 3 orphaned files and duplicated content patterns

The proposed governance model establishes clear ownership, review workflows, and automation responsibilities to maintain documentation quality at scale.

# Governance & Maintenance Model

**Task:** Task 9: Governance & Maintenance Model  
**Generated:** 2026-03-02  
**Synthesizes:** Task-1 (Standards), Task-3 (Toolchain), Task-6 (Deduplication)

---

## Executive Summary

This document proposes a governance structure for the cc-skills documentation ecosystem based on findings from three investigative tasks:

- **Task-1**: Found 23 plugins with inconsistent documentation standards (87% compliance)
- **Task-3**: Mapped automation tools with maturity gaps in validation/linting
- **Task-6**: Identified 3 orphaned files and duplicated content patterns

The proposed governance model establishes clear ownership, review workflows, and automation responsibilities to maintain documentation quality at scale.

---

## 1. Current State Analysis

### 1.1 Documentation Health Metrics

| Metric | Current | Target |
|--------|---------|--------|
| Plugin count (marketplace.json) | 23 | 23 |
| Root CLAUDE.md plugin count | 20 (incorrect) | 23 |
| Plugins/CLAUDE.md plugin count | 21 (incorrect) | 23 |
| CLAUDE.md compliance rate | 87% | 100% |
| Orphaned files | 3 | 0 |
| Automation maturity (validation) | Medium | High |

### 1.2 Identified Issues (from dependencies)

| Issue | Source | Severity |
|-------|--------|----------|
| Plugin count mismatch in root CLAUDE.md | Task-1 | High |
| Missing Sibling link in kokoro-tts | Task-6 | High |
| 3 orphaned files (tool-inventory.md, 2 ADRs) | Task-6 | Medium |
| No markdown/CLAUDE.md linting | Task-3 | Medium |
| No SKILL.md template validation | Task-3 | Medium |
| 7 plugins missing Skills tables | Task-1 | Medium |
| 16 plugins missing Commands tables | Task-1 | Low |
| Duplicate 1Password documentation | Task-6 | Low |

---

## 2. Proposed Governance Structure

### 2.1 Ownership Model

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ                    Project Maintainer                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         (Strategic decisions, release approval)             в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                          в”Ӯ
        в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
        в–ј                 в–ј                 в–ј
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Doc Lead     в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  Tooling Lead в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  Plugin Leads в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (Standards)  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  (Automation) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  (Per-plugin) в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

#### Role Definitions

| Role | Responsibilities | Current State |
|------|------------------|---------------|
| **Project Maintainer** | Release approval, architectural decisions | Implicit (terryli) |
| **Doc Lead** | Documentation standards, CLAUDE.md compliance, review workflows | Unassigned |
| **Tooling Lead** | Automation scripts, validation tools, CI/CD | Implicit |
| **Plugin Leads** | Per-plugin ownership (23 plugins) | Unassigned |

### 2.2 Plugin Ownership Matrix

| Plugin | Owner | Status |
|--------|-------|--------|
| plugin-dev | @plugin-dev owner | Proposed |
| itp | @itp owner | Proposed |
| itp-hooks | @itp-hooks owner | Proposed |
| gh-tools | @gh-tools owner | Proposed |
| devops-tools | @devops-tools owner | Proposed |
| dotfiles-tools | @dotfiles-tools owner | Proposed |
| doc-tools | @doc-tools owner | Proposed |
| quality-tools | @quality-tools owner | Proposed |
| productivity-tools | @productivity-tools owner | Proposed |
| mql5 | @mql5 owner | Proposed |
| ru | @ru owner | Proposed |
| statusline-tools | @statusline-tools owner | Proposed |
| asciinema-tools | @asciinema-tools owner | Proposed |
| git-town-workflow | @git-town-workflow owner | Proposed |
| quant-research | @quant-research owner | Proposed |
| gmail-commander | @gmail-commander owner | Proposed |
| kokoro-tts | @kokoro-tts owner | Proposed |
| tts-telegram-sync | @tts-telegram-sync owner | Proposed |
| calcom-commander | @calcom-commander owner | Proposed |
| mise | @mise owner | Proposed |
| gitnexus-tools | @gitnexus-tools owner | Proposed |
| rust-tools | @rust-tools owner | Proposed |

---

## 3. Review & Update Workflows

### 3.1 Documentation Review Workflow

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ   Author     в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ   PR Review  в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ  Doc Lead    в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ   Merge      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (Plugin     в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ  (Standards  в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ  Approval    в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Owner)     в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ   Check)      в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
        в”Ӯ                    в”Ӯ                    в”Ӯ
        в–ј                    в–ј                    в–ј
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ validate-    в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ CLAUDE.md    в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ Release      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ plugins.mjs  в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ lint check   в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ Pipeline     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### 3.2 Pre-Release Documentation Checklist

Before any release, ensure:

- [ ] `validate-plugins.mjs --strict` passes
- [ ] All 23 plugins have valid marketplace.json entries
- [ ] All plugin CLAUDE.md files follow header format: `# <plugin-name> Plugin`
- [ ] All plugins have Hub + Sibling navigation links
- [ ] Root CLAUDE.md states "23 plugins"
- [ ] plugins/CLAUDE.md lists all 23 plugins
- [ ] No orphaned files in docs/ directory
- [ ] lychee link check passes

### 3.3 Plugin CLAUDE.md Standards

| Element | Required | Format |
|--------|----------|--------|
| Header | Yes | `# <plugin-name> Plugin` |
| Description | Yes | `> Brief description` |
| Hub Link | Yes | `**Hub**: [Root CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)` |
| Sibling Links | Yes | `**Sibling**: [<name> CLAUDE.md](../<path>/CLAUDE.md)` |
| Skills Table | Yes (or "No skills") | `\| Skill \| Purpose \|` |
| Commands Table | Recommended | `\| Command \| Purpose \|` |
| Hooks Table | If applicable | `\| Hook \| Event \| Purpose \|` |

---

## 4. Maintenance Workflows

| `sync-hooks-to-settings.sh` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |
| `sync-versions.mjs` | Tooling Lead | Per-release |

| semantic-release | Tooling Lead | Per-release |

### 4.2 New Plugin Onboarding

3. **Create SKILL.md**: Follow skill template with frontmatter

5. **Run Validation**: `validate-plugins.mjs --fix`
6. **Assign Owner**: Update this governance document

### 4.3 Orphan Cleanup Process

Quarterly review to identify and address orphaned content:

| Orphan File | Action |
|-------------|--------|
| `docs/tool-inventory.md` | Integrate into docs/CLAUDE.md or delete |
| `docs/adr/2025-12-13-itp-hooks-file-tree-detection.md` | Link from itp-hooks or archive |
| `docs/design/2025-12-10-clickhouse-skill-documentation-gaps/spec.md` | Link from devops-tools or delete |

# Governance & Maintenance Model

**Task:** Task 9: Governance & Maintenance Model  
**Generated:** 2026-03-02  
**Synthesizes:** Task-1 (Standards), Task-3 (Toolchain), Task-6 (Deduplication)

---

## Executive Summary

This document proposes a governance structure for the cc-skills documentation ecosystem based on findings from three investigative tasks:

- **Task-1**: Found 23 plugins with inconsistent documentation standards (87% compliance)
- **Task-3**: Mapped automation tools with maturity gaps in validation/linting
- **Task-6**: Identified 3 orphaned files and duplicated content patterns

The proposed governance model establishes clear ownership, review workflows, and automation responsibilities to maintain documentation quality at scale.

---

| Plugins/CLAUDE.md plugin count | 21 (incorrect) | 23 |
| CLAUDE.md compliance rate | 87% | 100% |
| Orphaned files | 3 | 0 |
| Automation maturity (validation) | Medium | High |

### 1.2 Identified Issues (from dependencies)

|-------|--------|----------|
| Plugin count mismatch in root CLAUDE.md | Task-1 | High |
| Missing Sibling link in kokoro-tts | Task-6 | High |
| 3 orphaned files (tool-inventory.md, 2 ADRs) | Task-6 | Medium |
| No markdown/CLAUDE.md linting | Task-3 | Medium |
| No SKILL.md template validation | Task-3 | Medium |

| Duplicate 1Password documentation | Task-6 | Low |

### 3.2 Pre-Release Documentation Checklist

Before any release, ensure:

- [ ] `validate-plugins.mjs --strict` passes
- [ ] All 23 plugins have valid marketplace.json entries
- [ ] All plugin CLAUDE.md files follow header format: `# <plugin-name> Plugin`
- [ ] All plugins have Hub + Sibling navigation links
- [ ] Root CLAUDE.md states "23 plugins"
- [ ] plugins/CLAUDE.md lists all 23 plugins
- [ ] No orphaned files in docs/ directory
- [ ] lychee link check passes

### 3.3 Plugin CLAUDE.md Standards

| Element | Required | Format |
|--------|----------|--------|
| Header | Yes | `# <plugin-name> Plugin` |
| Description | Yes | `> Brief description` |
| Hub Link | Yes | `**Hub**: [Root CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md)` |
| Sibling Links | Yes | `**Sibling**: [<name> CLAUDE.md](../<path>/CLAUDE.md)` |
| Skills Table | Yes (or "No skills") | `\| Skill \| Purpose \|` |
| Commands Table | Recommended | `\| Command \| Purpose \|` |
| Hooks Table | If applicable | `\| Hook \| Event \| Purpose \|` |

5. **Run Validation**: `validate-plugins.mjs --fix`

## Executive Summary

This document proposes a governance structure for the cc-skills documentation ecosystem based on findings from three investigative tasks:

- **Task-1**: Found 23 plugins with inconsistent documentation standards (87% compliance)
- **Task-3**: Mapped automation tools with maturity gaps in validation/linting
- **Task-6**: Identified 3 orphaned files and duplicated content patterns

The proposed governance model establishes clear ownership, review workflows, and automation responsibilities to maintain documentation quality at scale.

---

# Governance & Maintenance Model

**Task:** Task 9: Governance & Maintenance Model  
**Generated:** 2026-03-02  
**Synthesizes:** Task-1 (Standards), Task-3 (Toolchain), Task-6 (Deduplication)

---

## Executive Summary

This document proposes a governance structure for the cc-skills documentation ecosystem based on findings from three investigative tasks:

- **Task-1**: Found 23 plugins with inconsistent documentation standards (87% compliance)
- **Task-3**: Mapped automation tools with maturity gaps in validation/linting
- **Task-6**: Identified 3 orphaned files and duplicated content patterns

The proposed governance model establishes clear ownership, review workflows, and automation responsibilities to maintain documentation quality at scale.

---

## 1. Current State Analysis

### 1.1 Documentation Health Metrics

| Metric | Current | Target |
|--------|---------|--------|
| Plugin count (marketplace.json) | 23 | 23 |
| Root CLAUDE.md plugin count | 20 (incorrect) | 23 |
| Plugins/CLAUDE.md plugin count | 21 (incorrect) | 23 |
| CLAUDE.md compliance rate | 87% | 100% |
| Orphaned files | 3 | 0 |
| Automation maturity (validation) | Medium | High |

### 1.2 Identified Issues (from dependencies)

| Issue | Source | Severity |
|-------|--------|----------|
| Plugin count mismatch in root CLAUDE.md | Task-1 | High |
| Missing Sibling link in kokoro-tts | Task-6 | High |
| 3 orphaned files (tool-inventory.md, 2 ADRs) | Task-6 | Medium |
| No markdown/CLAUDE.md linting | Task-3 | Medium |
| No SKILL.md template validation | Task-3 | Medium |
| 7 plugins missing Skills tables | Task-1 | Medium |
| 16 plugins missing Commands tables | Task-1 | Low |
| Duplicate 1Password documentation | Task-6 | Low |

---

## 2. Proposed Governance Structure

### 2.1 Ownership Model

```

в”Ӯ                    Project Maintainer                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         (Strategic decisions, release approval)             в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ

в”Ӯ  (Standards)  в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  (Automation) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  (Per-plugin) в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

#### Role Definitions

| Role | Responsibilities | Current State |
|------|------------------|---------------|
| **Project Maintainer** | Release approval, architectural decisions | Implicit (terryli) |
| **Doc Lead** | Documentation standards, CLAUDE.md compliance, review workflows | Unassigned |
| **Tooling Lead** | Automation scripts, validation tools, CI/CD | Implicit |
| **Plugin Leads** | Per-plugin ownership (23 plugins) | Unassigned |

### 2.2 Plugin Ownership Matrix

|--------|-------|--------|

| itp | @itp owner | Proposed |
| itp-hooks | @itp-hooks owner | Proposed |
| gh-tools | @gh-tools owner | Proposed |

| dotfiles-tools | @dotfiles-tools owner | Proposed |

| ru | @ru owner | Proposed |
| statusline-tools | @statusline-tools owner | Proposed |
| asciinema-tools | @asciinema-tools owner | Proposed |
| git-town-workflow | @git-town-workflow owner | Proposed |
| quant-research | @quant-research owner | Proposed |
| gmail-commander | @gmail-commander owner | Proposed |
| kokoro-tts | @kokoro-tts owner | Proposed |
| tts-telegram-sync | @tts-telegram-sync owner | Proposed |
| calcom-commander | @calcom-commander owner | Proposed |
| mise | @mise owner | Proposed |
| gitnexus-tools | @gitnexus-tools owner | Proposed |
| rust-tools | @rust-tools owner | Proposed |

---

## 3. Review & Update Workflows

### 3.1 Documentation Review Workflow

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ   Author     в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ   PR Review  в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ  Doc Lead    в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–¶в”Ӯ   Merge      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (Plugin     в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ  (Standards  в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ  Approval    в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   Owner)     в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ   Check)      в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ     в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
        в”Ӯ                    в”Ӯ                    в”Ӯ
